purpose: Determine whether any available first-principles route can presently produce a provenance-bound finite-temperature eight-band HgCdTe-family matrix with spin-orbit coupling, complete thermal renormalization, polar long-range control, and auditable gauge handling.

qe_ph_postahc.description: Quantum ESPRESSO ph.x electron_phonon='ahc' plus postahc.x using the pinned QE 7.4.1 source.
evidence: Pinned PHonon/PH/ahc.f90 exports ahc_gkk, upper Fan, and off-diagonal Debye-Waller matrices.
The implementation uses a generalized acoustic sum rule and a psi_gauge overlap matrix.
The same source states that magnetism, both collinear and noncollinear, is not implemented or not tested; no repository evidence validates the nonmagnetic SOC eight-band case.
The current CdTe PBE dielectric and Born response is rejected for long-range polar use.
blockers: dedicated nonmagnetic SOC matrix validation absent
physical source and target long-range polar models absent
long-range correction of the Debye-Waller channel undefined

epw_standard.description: EPW Wannier interpolation and electron self-energy with SOC and lpolar.
evidence: EPW documents SOC spinor transformations, SOC workflows, lphase gauge handling, and lpolar long-range subtraction/restoration.
Official EPW documentation states that the standard electron self-energy currently computes only Fan-Migdal and not Debye-Waller.
The validated repository Fan vertex architecture is aligned with EPW polar interpolation.
blockers: Debye-Waller absent from the standard self-energy path
off-diagonal eight-band self-energy export not validated

abinit_modern_eph.description: ABINIT optdriver=7 modern EPH workflow for Fan plus Debye-Waller self-energy.
evidence: ABINIT's modern EPH documentation provides Fan plus Debye-Waller and a polar Frohlich microzone correction.
The official EPH introduction states that spin-orbit coupling is not supported as of May 2026.
Published output is band-resolved rather than an audited off-diagonal eight-band matrix.
blockers: modern EPH does not support SOC

abinit_legacy_spinor.description: Legacy ABINIT electron-phonon workflow retained for spinor compatibility.
evidence: ABINIT documents the legacy workflow as compatible with spinors and SOC.
The legacy workflow is deprecated and does not provide the required audited off-diagonal matrix interface.
blockers: modern polar and gauge requirements unverified

zg_special_displacement.description: ZG special-displacement supercells followed by standard SOC electronic-structure calculations and selected-band matrix reconstruction.
evidence: ZG special displacements are combined with ordinary DFT calculations and official tutorials identify SOC as an available accuracy refinement.
The method provides the combined thermal electronic effect without an explicit Fan/Debye-Waller split.
ZG supports multiple configurations and single-phonon displacements, but degeneracy handling is not automatic.
No repository implementation yet reconstructs and symmetry-restores an eight-band matrix from distorted supercells.
blockers: degenerate-manifold gauge and symmetry restoration unvalidated

custom_soc_debye_waller.description: New SOC-generalized Debye-Waller and long-range correction implementation.
evidence: The generalized acoustic-sum-rule matrix formalism exists in the literature and in QE's scalar-tested AHC implementation.
No project implementation, independent test suite, or production provenance exists.
blockers: SOC generalized-ASR derivation and validation absent

selection_policy.rationale: ZG is the only existing route that combines ordinary SOC electronic calculations with a total thermal effect, thereby avoiding dependence on an unvalidated explicit SOC Debye-Waller backend. Its matrix, gauge, symmetry, finite-size and polar-correction steps must be falsified synthetically before any execution.
selection_policy.secondary_rationale: QE has the desired off-diagonal Fan and generalized-ASR Debye-Waller objects, but the nonmagnetic SOC case lacks dedicated validation and still requires a physical long-range correction strategy.

claim_boundary: The audit reflects documented capabilities and explicit repository evidence as of 2026-07-18. A route marked pass is not thereby physically validated for CdTe. A route marked unverified may be technically capable but cannot be selected without a dedicated falsification test. No backend is authorized for real A1 execution by this contract.
